channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 3 x large potholes and broken surface., 10th March
item.description:
Out side No 163 Hewlett Rd 3 substantial potholes in the road and badly broken up road surface. This road was' repaired ' last week and was left in this condition! Someone at Gloucestershire Highways need to take control of this section of road to get it finally fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163b, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 10th March
item.description:
potholes on section dangerous causing damage to vehicles, needs repairing. previous repairs stated but customer has not seen and works done
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 10th March
item.description:

item.title: Flags on lampposts along Britannia way, 10th March
item.description:
Flags along Britainnia way and two hedges road attached to lamp posts using cable ties.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Britannia Way, Cheltenham
